# Entrepreneurship -

a continuous storm

We are the [most active HealthTech investor](https://sifted.eu/articles/most-active-early-stage-healthtech-investors/) in Europe. Join our community of founders supporting founders, finding calm during the storm.

‍

![Image 2](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5ea5daf4a5a8d27565dffaf5/5fdc546583594ebb9a471d33_below-the-fold-brush-rotated-transparent-optimized.avif)

# Calm/Storm - a boutique venture capital firm

[Purpose](https://www.calmstorm.vc/#)

We invest in purpose driven founders changing our life, health and wellbeing for the better. We focus on HealthTech including "digital health" and "well-being", prevention and care, B2B and B2C startups. We have an outstanding track-record, named #1 HealthTech investor in Europe since 2020. Our aim is to create both, impact and financial returns. Our portfolio spans from fertility, to AI enabled infrastructure, from mental health issues to clinical decision support, from insurtech to chronic constipation, from SaaS tools for HCPs to taboo topics that everyone could encounter at some point in life.

[Super early stage](https://www.calmstorm.vc/#)

We are a super-early stage investor and want to join your journey as early as we can. Usually we invest in your first fundraising round. No final co-founder team?No final pitch deck?No worries!Apply through our website. Let's start talking.

[Diversity](https://www.calmstorm.vc/#)

We believe in diversity and equal opportunities and support underrepresented minorities. We believe that diverse teams deliver better results. Not only within our own team but also for our portfolio companies. More than 50% of our team members and board members as well as more than 50% of our portfolio founders are part of such an underrepresented group. Together we will change the venture capital industry.

## Read our Book

Get yourself a copy of the latest edition

### Digital Health Compass

Introducing the latest edition of our annual publication series! Calm/Storm proudly presents our fourth book, a testament to innovation and resilience in the startup world. Each year, we curate insights from emerging startups, visionary entrepreneurs in our exclusive network, and esteemed industry experts. These invaluable contributions offer strategies for navigating crises, staying composed under pressure, and illuminating the path forward.

This year's edition is our most ambitious yet, featuring an in-depth exploration of the European Health Tech landscape. Dive into the future of healthcare innovation with our Digital Health Compass.

Embrace the insights that will shape tomorrow's healthcare landscape. Get your hands on Calm/Storm's Digital Health Compass today!
